DescribeMetricData.action: API name, current value is DescribeMetricData
DescribeMetricData.metrics.name: Metric name
DescribeMetricData.metrics.compareTo: Comparison data; omit to skip. Options: 5m (period-over-period, supports m and h), yesterday (day-over-day), lastweek (week-over-week), YYYY-mm-dd (specific date comparison, UTC)
DescribeMetricData.metrics.filters: Metric-specific filter conditions, merged with global filters
DescribeMetricData.metrics.filters.op: Filter operator. Options: `=` - equals, `:` - equals, `!=` - not equals, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal
DescribeMetricData.metrics.filters.value: Single value, applicable to operators: =, !=, contains, >, >=, <, <=
DescribeMetricData.metrics.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
DescribeMetricData.filters: Global filter list shared across all metrics
DescribeMetricData.filters.op: Filter operator. Options: `=` - equals, `:` - equals, `!=` - not equals, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal
DescribeMetricData.filters.value: Single value, applicable to operators: =, !=, contains, >, >=, <, <=
DescribeMetricData.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
DescribeMetricData.limit: Result count limit; if not set, the backend returns as much data as possible
DescribeMetricData.periodSeconds: Aggregation period in seconds; one aggregation point is computed every periodSeconds seconds. If 0 or unset, a single aggregation point is computed over the entire time range. Default: 0
DescribeMetricData.reserveEmptyDimensions: Whether to retain time series with empty dimensions. Default: false
